basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for JRF, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate - III, Software Developer, Field Worker, Junior Research Fellow (JRF)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website of NIT Raipur. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 for Research Associate-III, Software Developer, Field Worker, and Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D, ME/M.Tech, BE/B.Tech, MCA, B.Sc (CS/IT), BCA
qualification.details: Research Associate - III: Ph.D + ME/M.Tech in CSE/IT/Electronics/Biomedical/Electrical/AI/Data Science/Applied Geology/Civil/Mining or equivalent OR 3 years post ME/M.Tech research/teaching/design experience + at least 2 SCI journal papers. Software Developer: B.E./B.Tech in CSE/IT/Electronics/AI/Data Science OR MCA or equivalent (min. 60% or 6.5 CGPA). Desirable: Sound knowledge in AI, Deep Learning, Python/R or other programming. Field Worker: B.Sc in Computer Science / IT OR BCA OR B.E./B.Tech in any discipline. Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E./B.Tech + M.E./M.Tech in CSE/IT/Electronics/Electrical/AI/Data Science/Applied Geology/Civil/Mining (min. 60% or 6.5 CGPA in PG) OR B.E./B.Tech from Institute of National Importance with min. 80% / 8.5 CGPA. Desirable: GATE/NET qualified, Sound knowledge in AI, Deep Learning, Python/R.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 is 23-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 6 vacancies are available for various posts including Research Associate – III, Software Developer, Field Worker, and Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the posts in NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 67,000/- per month, plus 20% HRA, depending on the post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications range from BCA, B.Sc (CS/IT), BE/B.Tech, MCA, ME/M.Tech, to Ph.D, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 25-05-2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the positions advertised by NIT Raipur?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions advertised by NIT Raipur is Contractual.
